VOXCHRONICLE.Title: VoxChronicle
VOXCHRONICLE.Description: Auto-transcribe RPG sessions and publish chronicles to Kanka with AI-generated content and portraits.

Settings.OpenAIKeyHint: Your OpenAI API key for transcription and image generation. Get one at platform.openai.com
Settings.KankaTokenHint: Your Kanka personal access token. Generate at app.kanka.io/settings/api
Settings.KankaCampaignHint: The numeric ID of your Kanka campaign (found in the campaign URL)
Settings.LanguageHint: Specify language for improved transcription accuracy, or leave on auto-detect
Settings.AIResponseLanguageHint: Language for AI suggestions, rules answers, and all AI-generated text
Settings.TranscriptionModeHint: Choose between cloud API, local Whisper backend, or automatic selection
Settings.TranscriptionModeAuto: Auto (try local first, fallback to API)
Settings.WhisperBackendUrlHint: URL of your local whisper.cpp server (default: http://localhost:8080)
Settings.ShowTranscriptionModeIndicatorHint: Display the current transcription mode in the recorder UI
Settings.AudioSourceHint: Choose where to capture audio from during recording
Settings.AudioSourceAuto: Automatic (try Foundry VTT first, then microphone)
Settings.HasAudioRecoveryHint: Indicates that recoverable audio chunks exist from a previous crash
Settings.PreferredCodecHint: Audio codec to use for recording. Auto-detect is recommended for best compatibility.
Settings.EchoCancellationHint: Enable echo cancellation for clearer recordings
Settings.NoiseSuppressionHint: Enable noise suppression to reduce background noise
Settings.ImageQualityHint: Quality setting for AI-generated images (higher quality costs more)
Settings.MaxImagesHint: Maximum number of AI-generated images per session (0 to disable)
Settings.AutoExtractHint: Automatically extract NPCs, locations, and items from transcriptions
Settings.ConfirmEntitiesHint: Show preview dialog before creating entities in Kanka
Settings.AutoExtractRelationshipsHint: Automatically detect relationships between entities from transcriptions
Settings.RelationshipConfidenceThresholdHint: Minimum confidence score (1-10) for detected relationships to be included
Settings.MaxRelationshipsHint: Maximum number of relationships to extract per session (0 to disable)
Settings.SessionCostCapHint: Maximum API cost per live session in dollars. AI suggestions pause when exceeded. Set to 0 to disable.
Settings.SpeakerLabelsHint: Map speaker IDs to player names for transcription
Settings.SpeakerLabelingHint: Assign player names to detected speaker voices
Settings.VocabularyDictionaryHint: Custom vocabulary terms for improved transcription accuracy (managed via Vocabulary UI)
Settings.ApiKeyHint: Your OpenAI API key. Requires a paid account with credits (minimum $5). Get it from platform.openai.com/api-keys
Settings.TranscriptionBatchDurationHint: Audio accumulation time before transcription in milliseconds (5-30 seconds). Higher values reduce API calls and improve transcription quality with longer segments
Settings.PanelPositionHint: Saved position of the DM panel
Settings.SensitivityHint: How strictly to detect when players deviate from the adventure plot
Settings.SpeakerLabelsHintNM: Enable custom name assignment to detected speakers in transcription
Settings.DebugModeHint: Enable detailed debug messages in the browser console. Useful for troubleshooting issues and monitoring module behavior
Settings.RulesDetectionHint: Enable automatic detection of rules questions in conversations
Settings.RulesSourceHint: Select which compendium to use for rules answers
Settings.ApiRetryEnabledHint: Automatically retry failed API requests with exponential backoff
Settings.ApiRetryMaxAttemptsHint: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed API requests (0-10)
Settings.ApiRetryBaseDelayHint: Initial delay in milliseconds before the first retry attempt
Settings.ApiRetryMaxDelayHint: Maximum delay in milliseconds between retries (exponential backoff limit)
Settings.ApiQueueMaxSizeHint: Maximum number of API requests that can be queued simultaneously
Settings.MultiLanguageModeHintVC: Enable transcription of multiple languages in the same session
Settings.TranscriptionBatchDurationHintVC: How often to transcribe during live mode (5-30 seconds)
Settings.AdaptiveChunkingHint: Automatically adjust transcription interval based on speech activity (shorter during conversation, longer during silence)
Settings.OffTrackSensitivityHint: How sensitive the AI is to detecting off-track players
Settings.RulesDetectionHintVC: Detect D&D rules questions in conversation
Settings.ApiRetryMaxAttemptsHintVC: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed API requests
Settings.ApiQueueMaxSizeHintVC: Maximum number of API requests that can be queued
Settings.RAGEnabledHint: Use Retrieval-Augmented Generation to enhance AI responses with context from journals and compendiums
Settings.RAGIndexOnLoadHint: Automatically build the RAG index when VoxChronicle initializes
Settings.RAGTopResultsHint: Number of most relevant chunks to retrieve for AI context (1-20)
Settings.RAGSimilarityThresholdHint: Minimum similarity score (0-1) for retrieved chunks to be included
Settings.RAGChunkSizeHint: Size of text chunks for indexing (200-1000 characters)
Settings.RAGAutoIndexHint: Automatically rebuild RAG index when journal content changes
Settings.RAGEmbeddingModelHint: OpenAI model used for generating embeddings
Settings.RAGEmbeddingDimensionsHint: Vector dimensions (512/1024/1536). Lower is faster, higher is more accurate
Settings.RAGMaxResultsHint: Maximum number of context chunks to retrieve per query (1-20)
Settings.RAGStorageLimitHint: Maximum IndexedDB storage for vector embeddings (10-500 MB)
Settings.RAGSilenceThresholdHint: Time in milliseconds before triggering autonomous suggestion (10-120 seconds)
Settings.RAGProviderHint: Choose which RAG backend to use for knowledge retrieval
Settings.RAGFlowBaseUrlHint: URL of your RAGFlow server (e.g. http://localhost:9380)
Settings.RAGFlowApiKeyHint: API key for your RAGFlow instance (from RAGFlow admin panel)
Settings.RAGFlowModelNameHint: Name of the LLM model configured in RAGFlow (leave empty for default)
Settings.InvalidUrlScheme: Invalid URL scheme "{protocol}" — only http/https allowed.
Settings.ActiveAdventureJournalHint: The primary journal that drives AI context in live mode
Settings.SupplementaryJournalsHint: Additional journals providing context alongside the primary adventure journal
Settings.ContextTokenBudgetHint: Maximum tokens per AI suggestion cycle. Lower values reduce costs, higher values provide more context. Default: 12000

Help.Title: VoxChronicle Help
Help.GettingStartedText:
1. Configure your OpenAI API key and Kanka credentials in module settings.
2. Start a recording session using the record button.
3. After your session, stop the recording and transcribe it.
4. Review extracted entities and publish to Kanka.
Help.ApiKeysText: You need an OpenAI API key (for transcription and images) and a Kanka API token (for publishing). Both are required for full functionality.
Help.CostsText: OpenAI transcription costs $0.006/minute. gpt-image-1 images cost $0.02 (low), $0.04 (medium), or $0.08 (high) per image.
Help.SupportText: For issues and feature requests, please visit our GitHub repository.
